description:
The same TaskStatus → string match block is copy-pasted in 4 files:
- orchestrator-core/src/services/planning_shared.rs:492
- orchestrator-cli/src/services/operations/ops_git/worktree.rs:35
- orchestrator-cli/src/services/runtime/runtime_daemon/daemon_git_helpers.rs:175
- orchestrator-cli/src/services/tui/task_snapshot.rs:43

And parse_task_status (string → TaskStatus with alias handling for "todo", "in_progress", "on_hold") is duplicated between CLI parsing.rs and web_api_service/parsing.rs.

Same pattern for RequirementStatus → string (3 copies).

Solution: Add `impl Display for TaskStatus` and `impl FromStr for TaskStatus` on the protocol type (or orchestrator-core if that's where TaskStatus lives). Same for RequirementStatus. Delete all private copies.
title: Implement `Display`/`FromStr` for `TaskStatus` and `RequirementStatus` to eliminate 4x duplication
